---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for NeoDAX
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What limitation in NeoDAX does this address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed feature clearly. Include:
- What the feature does
- What CLI flags or API methods it would add
- What output it would produce

## Alternatives Considered

Are there workarounds you've tried? Why aren't they sufficient?

## Additional Context

- Architecture(s) affected: (x86-64 / ARM64 / RISC-V / all)
- Format(s) affected: (ELF / PE / all)
- Is this related to an item in [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)?

---

**Large features:** Consider opening a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/VersaNexusIX/NeoDAX/discussions) first to discuss design before implementation.
